title: angelica dawsonii
intro: Angelica dawsonii is a plant species, also known as the Dawson's angelica or Dawson's angelica root, that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Angelica dawsonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
